bio: With over a decade in front-end development, I've worked with multiple companies and now provide freelance services, delivering innovative web solutions with cutting-edge technologies.
journey: My journey began with traditional web technologies and has evolved to embrace modern frameworks, performance optimization, and user experience design. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code while creating stunning user experiences that make a difference.
alwaysLearningDesc: Continuously adding new tools to my arsenal for better development experiences
